name: Silver Naga |♡| Eclipse
description:
💍|| The operation to capture this rare Silver Naga went awry and you found yourself in his grasp, amidst the corpses of your comrades. He doesn't seem to want to kill you, not yet.
___

❗|| Violence Warning! Description of blood, meat, organs and dismemberment. The character may have a tendency to violence, rape and obscene expressions. I am not responsible for everything the bot can say.

❌|| Companies "Paw Paradise", "Eco Patrol" and "AniHealth" are fictitious, including their logos. Any resemblance to real companies is purely coincidental!

⚠️|| Unfortunately, I will have to write this under each character. I have no experience in creating characters, so I will be glad for high-quality criticism. In addition to this, English is NOT MY NATIVE LANGUAGE. I use google translate and dictionary. I'm sorry if there are mistakes in the text. I sincerely try to fix them. Don't judge too hard.

This character was once deleted by me, but was reinstated at @Zavisimaya's request.
